Thank you for contributing!

We want to accept your submission, so please make it easy for us!

Help the reviewer:

- If you are using AI, please tell us and indicate to what degree. We prefer humans, but we accept AI assisted contributions. Letting us know helps us set review expectations.
- If this is related to an open issue, please add a link.
- If there isn't an open issue, please describe your change, why you've made it, and how you've verified it.
- Smaller changes are easier to accept, so aim for that. If you're working on a big change, try and break it up.

We always try and find a way to accept help, but reserve the right to reject it. Common reasons for rejection are that the change is misaligned with the direction of the project (avoidable by raising an issue and discussing first), the submission quality is poor on some level (including AI code that takes shortcuts), or that the change is just too difficult or too much effort to review and refine - our time is limited and our reviewers are busy humans.
